leadText: Artisan Cave (Japanese: アトリエのあな Atelier Hole) is a long cave connecting one end of the Battle Frontier to the other. The entrance is near the Battle Palace and the exit is right next to the Battle Tower. It only appears in Pokémon Emerald.

sections.title: In the games
sections.text: Contents 1 In the games 1.1 Geography 1.2 Items 1.3 Pokémon 1.4 Layout 1.5 Music In the games [ edit | edit source ] Geography [ edit | edit source ] The cave is two floors high, contains several vitamins , and the only wild Pokémon found inside is Smeargle . This is the only area in the Generation III core series games (other than via the unused Altering Cave event) where the player can find Smeargle. Items [ edit | edit source ] Item Location Games Iron B1F, on the more northern of the two rocks northeast of the entrance (hidden) E Zinc B1F, down a flight of stairs, on the rock in the center of the pit north of the HP Up (hidden) E HP Up B1F, down a flight of stairs, in the center of the south-easternmost pit, south of the Zinc E Calcium B1F, in the northeastern area of the map, on the more right of the two rocks on the ledge northwest of a flight of stairs (hidden) E Protein B1F, on the more northern of the two rocks at the most northwest point of the map (hidden) E Carbos 1F, at the end of the eastern path from the exit E Pokémon [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Games Location Levels Rate Smeargle R S E Cave 40-50 100% A colored background means that the Pokémon can be found in this location in the specified game. A white background with a colored letter means that the Pokémon cannot be found here.
